questions.stem: I ______ the book for two weeks. I ______ it from the library last Friday.
questions.explanation: 第一空后有'for two weeks'表示一段时间，需用延续性动词keep（保留）的现在完成时have kept，不能用瞬间动词borrow；第二空有'yesterday'明确过去时间，用一般过去时borrowed。技巧：看到for/since等时间段，检查动词是否为延续性动词。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The story ______ you told me yesterday is very interesting.
questions.explanation: 先行词the story指物，在定语从句中作宾语，关系代词用which或that。who/whom指人，whose表示'……的'。技巧：空格前是物名用which/that，是人名用who/that。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The old bridge near my school ______ many years ago.
questions.explanation: 主语bridge与build是被动关系（桥被建），且'many years ago'是过去时间标志，故用一般过去时的被动语态was built。技巧：被动语态基本结构be+过去分词，注意时态由be体现。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: I wonder ______ Mary will join our English party next week.
questions.explanation: wonder表示'想知道'，后接宾语从句表'是否'时用if或whether引导。that无实际意义，what/which需在从句中充当成分。本句不缺少主谓宾，只缺'是否'含义。技巧：看到wonder/don't know常选if/whether表疑问。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: If you add the prefix 'un-' to the word 'healthy', you get 'unhealthy', which means ______.
questions.explanation: 前缀un-表示否定含义，意为'不、非'，unhealthy即'不健康的'。技巧：常见否定前缀un-/dis-/im-/in-都表'不'，后缀-less也表否定（如careless）。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: The ______ news about the school trip made all of us feel ______.
questions.explanation: exciting（令人兴奋的）修饰事物news，excited（感到兴奋的）修饰人us。技巧：-ing形容词表示'令人……的'，修饰物；-ed形容词表示'感到……的'，修饰人。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: We should ______ our seats to the elderly when we take the bus.
questions.explanation: give up表示'放弃、让出'，give up seats即'让座'；give away赠送/泄露；give out分发；give in屈服。技巧：give up搭配seat表示让座，是固定用法。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.group_passage: Last month, our school started a "Green School" project. We wanted to make our campus more environmentally friendly. First, we set up recycling bins in every classroom. Students were asked to separate waste into different categories. At first, many students found it (8)______ to remember which bin to use. But with the help of posters and teachers' guidance, everyone soon got used to it. The most exciting part was creating a small garden on the rooftop. We planted vegetables and flowers there. It was amazing to see how a boring concrete space could be (9)______ into a green area. Every Friday afternoon, volunteers collect the recyclable materials and (10)______ them to a recycling center. The money earned is used to buy more plants. So far, we (11)______ over 500 yuan from this activity. This project has changed the way we think about waste. We now understand that even small actions can make a big (12)______ to protecting our environment.
questions.explanation: 根据下文'But with the help...everyone soon got used to it'（但在帮助下才习惯）可推断，起初觉得'困难'。A、C、D均为积极词汇，与转折逻辑不符。技巧：关注连词but/however前后的语义转折。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage: Last month, our school started a "Green School" project. We wanted to make our campus more environmentally friendly. First, we set up recycling bins in every classroom. Students were asked to separate waste into different categories. At first, many students found it (8)______ to remember which bin to use. But with the help of posters and teachers' guidance, everyone soon got used to it. The most exciting part was creating a small garden on the rooftop. We planted vegetables and flowers there. It was amazing to see how a boring concrete space could be (9)______ into a green area. Every Friday afternoon, volunteers collect the recyclable materials and (10)______ them to a recycling center. The money earned is used to buy more plants. So far, we (11)______ over 500 yuan from this activity. This project has changed the way we think about waste. We now understand that even small actions can make a big (12)______ to protecting our environment.
questions.explanation: turn into为固定搭配，意为'变成'，被动语态为be turned into。change into也通，但turn更强调性质完全转变，且与into搭配最紧密。divide into分成；make into制成。技巧：turn A into B（把A变成B）是完形高频搭配。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage: Last month, our school started a "Green School" project. We wanted to make our campus more environmentally friendly. First, we set up recycling bins in every classroom. Students were asked to separate waste into different categories. At first, many students found it (8)______ to remember which bin to use. But with the help of posters and teachers' guidance, everyone soon got used to it. The most exciting part was creating a small garden on the rooftop. We planted vegetables and flowers there. It was amazing to see how a boring concrete space could be (9)______ into a green area. Every Friday afternoon, volunteers collect the recyclable materials and (10)______ them to a recycling center. The money earned is used to buy more plants. So far, we (11)______ over 500 yuan from this activity. This project has changed the way we think about waste. We now understand that even small actions can make a big (12)______ to protecting our environment.
questions.explanation: send...to...表示'把……寄送到/运送到'，符合语境（把可回收物送到回收中心）。take带走（远离说话者），bring带来（靠近说话者），carry强调负重搬运。技巧：send to表示送往某处，常用于邮寄、运送场景。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage: Last month, our school started a "Green School" project. We wanted to make our campus more environmentally friendly. First, we set up recycling bins in every classroom. Students were asked to separate waste into different categories. At first, many students found it (8)______ to remember which bin to use. But with the help of posters and teachers' guidance, everyone soon got used to it. The most exciting part was creating a small garden on the rooftop. We planted vegetables and flowers there. It was amazing to see how a boring concrete space could be (9)______ into a green area. Every Friday afternoon, volunteers collect the recyclable materials and (10)______ them to a recycling center. The money earned is used to buy more plants. So far, we (11)______ over 500 yuan from this activity. This project has changed the way we think about waste. We now understand that even small actions can make a big (12)______ to protecting our environment.
questions.explanation: raise money为固定搭配，意为'筹集资金'。so far（到目前为止）是现在完成时标志，故用have raised。collect收集；save节省；make制造。技巧：raise funds/money是'筹款'的固定表达。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage: Last month, our school started a "Green School" project. We wanted to make our campus more environmentally friendly. First, we set up recycling bins in every classroom. Students were asked to separate waste into different categories. At first, many students found it (8)______ to remember which bin to use. But with the help of posters and teachers' guidance, everyone soon got used to it. The most exciting part was creating a small garden on the rooftop. We planted vegetables and flowers there. It was amazing to see how a boring concrete space could be (9)______ into a green area. Every Friday afternoon, volunteers collect the recyclable materials and (10)______ them to a recycling center. The money earned is used to buy more plants. So far, we (11)______ over 500 yuan from this activity. This project has changed the way we think about waste. We now understand that even small actions can make a big (12)______ to protecting our environment.
questions.explanation: make a difference为固定短语，意为'有影响、起作用'。句意：即使小行动也能对环保产生大影响。decision决定；mistake错误；progress进步（与make搭配时通常说make progress）。技巧：make a difference是中考完形高频短语。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage: Have you ever imagined a forest growing on the side of a building? This is not science fiction. In cities like Milan and Nanjing, "vertical forests" are becoming real. A vertical forest is a building covered with trees, shrubs and plants on its balconies and facades. These green buildings are designed to bring nature back to crowded cities. The plants absorb carbon dioxide and produce oxygen, making the air cleaner. They also help reduce noise pollution and lower the temperature inside the buildings. However, building and maintaining vertical forests is expensive. The soil and irrigation systems add extra weight to the building structure. Despite these challenges, many architects believe vertical forests represent the future of urban living.
questions.stem: Where can we find vertical forests mentioned in the passage?
questions.explanation: 细节题。根据第一段'In cities like Milan and Nanjing, "vertical forests" are becoming real'可知，文中明确提到米兰和南京有垂直森林。A项'只有米兰'遗漏南京；C项'所有欧洲城市'过于绝对；D项'小镇'与文中'cities'矛盾。技巧：细节题要精准定位原文，警惕绝对化词汇如only/all。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解

questions.group_passage: Have you ever imagined a forest growing on the side of a building? This is not science fiction. In cities like Milan and Nanjing, "vertical forests" are becoming real. A vertical forest is a building covered with trees, shrubs and plants on its balconies and facades. These green buildings are designed to bring nature back to crowded cities. The plants absorb carbon dioxide and produce oxygen, making the air cleaner. They also help reduce noise pollution and lower the temperature inside the buildings. However, building and maintaining vertical forests is expensive. The soil and irrigation systems add extra weight to the building structure. Despite these challenges, many architects believe vertical forests represent the future of urban living.
questions.stem: What does the underlined word "absorb" in Paragraph 2 probably mean?
questions.explanation: 词义猜测题。根据上下文，植物吸收二氧化碳并释放氧气，absorb与give out（释放）形成对比，故absorb意为'吸收'，即take in。turn down调低/拒绝；put away收好。技巧：利用并列结构'absorb...and produce...'的对比关系猜测词义。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测

questions.group_passage: Have you ever imagined a forest growing on the side of a building? This is not science fiction. In cities like Milan and Nanjing, "vertical forests" are becoming real. A vertical forest is a building covered with trees, shrubs and plants on its balconies and facades. These green buildings are designed to bring nature back to crowded cities. The plants absorb carbon dioxide and produce oxygen, making the air cleaner. They also help reduce noise pollution and lower the temperature inside the buildings. However, building and maintaining vertical forests is expensive. The soil and irrigation systems add extra weight to the building structure. Despite these challenges, many architects believe vertical forests represent the future of urban living.
questions.stem: What can we infer from the passage about vertical forests?
options: A. They are cheap to build.
B. They are becoming popular in cities.
C. They need no special care.
D. They can only grow small plants.
questions.explanation: 推理题。A项'便宜'与原文'expensive'矛盾；C项'无需特殊护理'与'maintaining...special care'矛盾；D项'只能种小植物'与'trees, shrubs'矛盾。根据'becoming real'和'future of urban living'可推断这种建筑正在城市流行。技巧：推理题要基于原文但避免直接陈述，排除与原文矛盾的选项。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断

questions.group_passage: Have you ever imagined a forest growing on the side of a building? This is not science fiction. In cities like Milan and Nanjing, "vertical forests" are becoming real. A vertical forest is a building covered with trees, shrubs and plants on its balconies and facades. These green buildings are designed to bring nature back to crowded cities. The plants absorb carbon dioxide and produce oxygen, making the air cleaner. They also help reduce noise pollution and lower the temperature inside the buildings. However, building and maintaining vertical forests is expensive. The soil and irrigation systems add extra weight to the building structure. Despite these challenges, many architects believe vertical forests represent the future of urban living.
questions.stem: What is the best title for this passage?
options: B. Vertical Forests: Buildings of the Future
C. How to Build a House
D. Air Pollution in Big Cities
questions.explanation: 主旨大意题。全文围绕vertical forests展开，介绍其概念、优点、挑战及前景。A项只提米兰，太窄；C项未提及森林；D项只涉及污染，是细节而非主旨。B项准确概括主题。技巧：最佳标题需覆盖全文核心词汇，避免以偏概全。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意

questions.group_passage: Many middle school students complain that they don't have enough time for hobbies because of heavy schoolwork. (17)______ They often feel stressed and don't know how to deal with this situation. (18)______ The key is to manage your time wisely. Here are some practical suggestions. (19)______ Write down all your tasks and estimate how long each takes. You'll probably find you have more free time than you thought. (20)______ When you finish your homework, reward yourself with hobby time. This balance will help you stay happy and motivated.
options: A. However, it is possible to enjoy both study and hobbies with good planning.
B. First, make a list of your daily activities and study tasks.
C. In addition, don't forget to schedule regular breaks for your hobbies.
D. As a result, many students give up their hobbies to focus only on study.
E. On the other hand, some students spend too much time on games and neglect their study.
questions.explanation: 前文提到'抱怨没时间发展爱好'，D项'As a result'（结果）承接上文，表示'许多学生放弃爱好只专注学习'，与后文'感到压力'形成因果链。A项转折突兀；B、C是建议，不适合此处；E讲另一面情况，与上下文不符。技巧：关注上下文逻辑关系，前因后果用as a result。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage: Many middle school students complain that they don't have enough time for hobbies because of heavy schoolwork. (17)______ They often feel stressed and don't know how to deal with this situation. (18)______ The key is to manage your time wisely. Here are some practical suggestions. (19)______ Write down all your tasks and estimate how long each takes. You'll probably find you have more free time than you thought. (20)______ When you finish your homework, reward yourself with hobby time. This balance will help you stay happy and motivated.
options: A. However, it is possible to enjoy both study and hobbies with good planning.
B. First, make a list of your daily activities and study tasks.
C. In addition, don't forget to schedule regular breaks for your hobbies.
D. As a result, many students give up their hobbies to focus only on study.
E. On the other hand, some students spend too much time on games and neglect their study.
questions.explanation: 前文说'感到压力不知如何处理'，A项'However'（然而）转折，引出'有好计划就能兼顾学习与爱好'，与后文'关键是时间管理'衔接自然。B、C是具体建议，应在引出建议之后；D已用过；E偏离主题。技巧：However用于转折引出新观点，常出现在问题-解决方案的过渡处。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage: Many middle school students complain that they don't have enough time for hobbies because of heavy schoolwork. (17)______ They often feel stressed and don't know how to deal with this situation. (18)______ The key is to manage your time wisely. Here are some practical suggestions. (19)______ Write down all your tasks and estimate how long each takes. You'll probably find you have more free time than you thought. (20)______ When you finish your homework, reward yourself with hobby time. This balance will help you stay happy and motivated.
options: A. However, it is possible to enjoy both study and hobbies with good planning.
B. First, make a list of your daily activities and study tasks.
C. In addition, don't forget to schedule regular breaks for your hobbies.
D. As a result, many students give up their hobbies to focus only on study.
E. On the other hand, some students spend too much time on games and neglect their study.
questions.explanation: 后文'Write down all your tasks'（写下所有任务）是B项'First, make a list...'（首先列清单）的具体操作。First表示列举第一条建议，与后文动作完全对应。C项In addition表示补充，应在前一条建议之后；其他选项不符。技巧：First/Second/Finally是列举建议的标志词，后文通常有具体动作对应。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage: Many middle school students complain that they don't have enough time for hobbies because of heavy schoolwork. (17)______ They often feel stressed and don't know how to deal with this situation. (18)______ The key is to manage your time wisely. Here are some practical suggestions. (19)______ Write down all your tasks and estimate how long each takes. You'll probably find you have more free time than you thought. (20)______ When you finish your homework, reward yourself with hobby time. This balance will help you stay happy and motivated.
options: A. However, it is possible to enjoy both study and hobbies with good planning.
B. First, make a list of your daily activities and study tasks.
C. In addition, don't forget to schedule regular breaks for your hobbies.
D. As a result, many students give up their hobbies to focus only on study.
E. On the other hand, some students spend too much time on games and neglect their study.
questions.explanation: 前文讲了第一条建议（列清单），C项'In addition'（此外）表示递进，引出第二条建议'安排爱好时间'，与后文'reward yourself with hobby time'（奖励自己爱好时间）完美衔接。E项讲反面情况，破坏建议的连贯性。技巧：In addition/Moreover/Besides用于列举同类建议的第二条。
questions.label: 短文填空
